name: SomeIpOutputMessage
title: SomeIpOutputMessage
syntax: long SomeIpOutputMessage( dword aepHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remotePort, dword messageHandle );
description: This function is used to send a SOME/IP message.

The packet is sent immediately. All messages that were prepared for sending beforehand with SomeIpPostMessage are inserted in the packet to be sent and sent with the message, provided that the buffered messages have the same source and the same destination.

parameters.name: aepHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the local Application Endpoint over which the message should be output.
